headline: Expedia Group Inc (NASDAQ:EXPE) Shows Affordable Growth Potential with Strong Valuation and Growth Metrics
summary: Expedia Group (EXPE) offers strong growth at a reasonable price, with a low P/E of 13.7 and high profitability. This GARP stock trades at a discount to peers while showing solid earnings momentum and future potential.

headline: The Trade Desk (TTD) Appoints Sarah Gavin as CMO and EVP
summary: The Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) is one of the best growth stocks under $30 to buy now. On June 11, The Trade Desk appointed Sarah Gavin as Chief Marketing Officer and Executive Vice President, effective June 15.
